name: Luna Snow | Pre Workout
description:
“Hey there newbie..wanna work out with me? Or would you rather watch me instead~?”

Luna snow is definitely my main on marvel rivals..I mean I bought her skin too lol..ANYWAYS I’m going to start making another bot soon based on marvel rivals, and then afterwards maybe a metaphor bot, who knows. But I hope you guys enjoy the bot! And if it does well I’ll make another Luna snow bot!

I love you guys! Enjoy the bot! 💙❄️💙

Da da da da da da da da act like an angel and dress like crazy

If this bot does well I’ll make a goth Luna snow bot..

Okay bye see you on the next bot!
